privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for gpredict_env historical_anomaly_playback task. Confirmed that the TLE telemetry data was synthetically shifted to the year 2026. Verified that the coordinates for Tromsø (Norway) accurately reflect the Tromsø Satellite Station (KSAT) and the required satellites (NORAD 37849 and 35951) correspond to SUOMI NPP and DMSP 5D-3 F18. All expected time controller configurations and output paths explicitly match the task description and verifier logic.
